name: Tool From Mesh
description: Construct a ToolModel from a Rhino mesh and a TCP plane. The TCP is expressed in the robot's `tool0` link frame. The same mesh is used for collision checking unless a separate `collision_mesh` is provided. Output feeds directly into AddToolToCell or AddAndAttachTool.

inputParameters.name: visual_mesh
inputParameters.description: Rhino mesh for visualization (and collision checking if no separate collision mesh is provided).

inputParameters.name: tcp_plane
inputParameters.description: Tool Coordinate Frame in the robot's `tool0` link frame, as a Rhino Plane or COMPAS Frame.

inputParameters.name: collision_mesh
inputParameters.description: Optional Rhino mesh used only for collision checking. Defaults to `visual_mesh`.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Tool identifier (used as the tool id when added to a cell). Defaults to `attached_tool`.
